name: ACE Cash Express
description_short: ACE Cash Express provides emergency loans, check cashing, and financial services with physical store locations across the U.S. and online lending options.
description_long: ACE Cash Express operates a multi-service financial institution primarily focused on serving consumers who need quick access to cash and alternative financial products. The company has maintained a network of physical store locations while developing online lending capabilities. Based on their website navigation and service menu, ACE Cash Express positions itself as a one-stop shop for emergency financial needs beyond traditional banking. The company collects personal information from California residents under state privacy laws and maintains formal customer service channels for both general and online lending inquiries. ACE Cash Express offers a diverse portfolio of lending and financial services designed for rapid deployment. Their primary products include installment loans, title loans, check cashing, bill payments, money transfers, tax services, and online loans. The website indicates they also offer cards and business services, though specific details on these offerings are limited in the available content. Their service menu suggests they operate across multiple consumer finance segments beyond emergency lending alone. What distinguishes ACE Cash Express is its hybrid physical-and-digital distribution model, combining brick-and-mortar store locations with online lending channels. They appear to maintain state-specific product availability, as evidenced by their messaging that certain loan types are unavailable in specific states. The company runs promotional campaigns (evidenced by the back-to-school gift card sweepstakes) and responds to regional disruptions (Hurricane Ida store closures) with customer communication. However, their website contains broken links and 404 errors on location-specific pages, suggesting operational or maintenance issues with their digital infrastructure. A significant caveat is that much of ACE Cash Express's specific loan terms, rates, APRs, and eligibility criteria cannot be verified from the provided website content. The broken Denver location pages prevent verification of local service availability. While they position themselves as an emergency lending provider, their diverse service menu (tax services, business services, money transfers) indicates broader financial service ambitions beyond the emergency-cash category. The company's compliance with state privacy laws shows attention to regulation, but consumers would need to access their full website or contact them directly for transparent pricing and product details.
address: 2707 S H St A, Bakersfield, CA 93304

company_info.headquarters: 2707 S H St A, Bakersfield, CA 93304

pros: Multiple service offerings: installment loans, title loans, check cashing, bill payments, money transfers, and tax services in one location
Online lending options available alongside physical store network for flexible access
Same-day or next-day funding capability implied by emergency-cash category positioning
Responsive to regional emergencies with customer communication (Hurricane Ida store closure updates)
State-specific compliance messaging (California Notice at Collection) shows regulatory awareness
Multiple customer service channels: phone and email support for general inquiries and online lending
Convenient store locator tool for finding physical locations
cons: Website contains multiple broken links and 404 errors preventing access to location-specific information and service details
No transparent rate or APR information available on provided website content
State-specific product restrictions prevent uniform service availability (message: 'this type of loan is not available in this state')
Limited visibility into actual loan terms, eligibility requirements, and cost disclosures
Physical store locations reportedly closed in some areas due to operational disruptions
best_for: Consumers seeking same-day or next-day emergency cash in states where ACE operates
Customers who prefer in-person financial transactions at physical store locations
Individuals needing bundled services like check cashing and bill payments alongside short-term loans
People with vehicle title assets interested in title-secured lending options
diagnosis: ACE Cash Express is best suited for consumers in their service areas who need immediate cash access and prefer either physical store interactions or online lending channels. The main caveat is that the broken website infrastructure limits transparency on actual terms, rates, and eligibility—consumers must contact ACE directly or visit stores to obtain complete loan pricing and disclosure information before committing.

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: Populus Financial Group, Inc. (F/K/A Ace Cash Express)
